name: columns.create
description: Add a column to an existing board. Use this to progressively add workflow stages (e.g. Backlog, In Review) as your team grows.

board_id.description: Board UUID to add the column to (required)

name.description: Column display name, e.g. 'Backlog' or 'In Review' (required)

status_mapping.description: Which work item status this column represents (required)

position.description: Column position (0-based). Columns at or after this position shift right.

wip_limit.description: Optional work-in-progress limit for this column

user_id.description: ID of the user adding the column

org_id.description: Optional organization ID for multi-tenant context
